超凡世界，遍地神明。
怪谈神话，分割统治。
只有获取人类的信仰，神明才能升级！
张北海穿越而来，但却被官方诬陷，即将判处死刑！
所幸他获取了特效之神系统，可以将所有事物增加特效，并伴随着等级提升，会逐渐变成现实！
靠着这个，他创造出了一个“全知全能”的神，并成为自己的信徒，混入了官方组织，招摇赚骗，获取信仰。
直到最后……
张北海立于高台，看着脚下众生的跪拜，微笑颔首。
“赞美我主。”
“叮！您的信仰+1，当前等级为至高级S。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o168a2b5f89d0a5883cfd36f877e64d63~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夜里我总在沉思","author_id":"","book_id":"7512879816043924542","book_name":"我真不是假神，只是特效多了些！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182858","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2732人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7512880177752310334","read_count":"2732","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"166969"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"75","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,无女主,搞笑轻松,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o168a2b5f89d0a5883cfd36f877e64d63~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779501732&x-signature=r0bhIkiUZ3W%2FG0YcZ7AC6X2JecQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108389229176","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"52"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241002123A2FF8C44B3A3B489DDE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读47分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count
